app.title: ESO Helper
app.subtitle: Your companion for The Elder Scrolls Online

hero.title: Welcome to Tamriel
hero.subtitle: Your ultimate companion for The Elder Scrolls Online
hero.description: Explore interactive maps, manage your characters, find crafting resources, and optimize your builds with ESO Helper.

maps.title: Interactive Maps
maps.description: Discover all zones, dungeons, delves, and hidden treasures with detailed markings.

builds.title: Character Builds
builds.description: Create and manage optimal builds for your characters with skill and equipment recommendations.

quests.title: Daily Quests
quests.description: Manage your daily quests and achievements to track your progression.

crafting.title: Crafting Resources
crafting.description: Find all crafting materials, recipes, and crafting locations across the world.

sets.title: Equipment Sets
sets.description: Browse all available sets, their bonuses, and locations.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Learn all skills, morphs, and ultimates for every class.

footer.description: ESO Helper is an unofficial companion for The Elder Scrolls Online.
footer.disclaimer: The Elder Scrolls Online is a trademark of ZeniMax Media Inc.
